\multicolumn{10}{p{0.92\linewidth}}{\footnotesize DerSimonian--Laird pool (Appendix~\ref{app:DL_estimator}): $\mu = -0.32 \pm 0.09$\,ppm, $\tau = 0.52$\,ppm, $I^2 = 51\,\%$; 13 of 75 cases differ significantly from zero ($|z|>1.96$) and 1 pass the $\pm$0.5\,ppm equivalence test. At the 50\,km radius: $\mu = -0.45 \pm 0.07$\,ppm, $\tau = 0.22$\,ppm, $I^2 = 14\,\%$ (68 of 69 cases with an evaluable budget). $D$: corrected station-day mean difference to AK-harmonized TCCON; $u_{\mathrm{OCO}}$: ensemble predictive term (effective-$n$, cloud-distance inflation); $u_{\mathrm{meas}}$, $u_{\mathrm{temp}}$, $u_{\mathrm{harm}}$, $u_{\mathrm{coll}}$: TCCON measurement, temporal-variability, harmonization, and collocation terms; $u_D$: quadrature total; $z = D/u_D$. All values in ppm.}\\
